# Bengaluru Events Directory — April 15 – May 30, 2026

> The most complete guide to 80+ tech events, hackathons, conferences, startup events, and meetups happening in Bengaluru (Bangalore), India — April and May 2026.

Website: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com
Author: Sagar Jethi (https://x.com/sagarbjethi)
Source: https://github.com/sagarjethi/bengaluru-events-apr-2026
Full event data: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/llms-full.txt

- Events by month index: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/events

- Bangalore startup accelerators (13 verified programs): https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators

## Key Facts

- 80+ events across April 15 – May 30, 2026 (~6 weeks)
- April 2026: 45 events including YC Startup School, GIDS, AWS Summit, Rust India, OpenAI Codex Hackathon
- May 2026: 35+ events including agentic AI workshops, platform engineering, React #103, Apache Kafka Bangalore, GitHub Copilot Dev Days, HasGeek "Enterprise AI in Production" Mini Conf
- 30+ free events (no ticket cost)
- 10 hackathons with $145,000+ in total prizes
- Location: Bengaluru (also known as Bangalore), Karnataka, India
- Categories: Conference, Hackathon, Startup, Web3/Crypto, Meetup, Music & Culture, Sports, Expo, Cybersecurity

## Featured Events (Highlights)

### Hackathons (10 total, $145K+ in prizes)
- OpenAI Codex Hackathon — Apr 16 — $100,000 prizes — Free — OpenAI's first India hackathon
- Meta PyTorch OpenEnv Hackathon — Apr 25–26 — $30,000 prizes — Free — Meta + Hugging Face
- ContextCon — YC x Crustdata Hackathon — Apr 19 — $12,000 prizes — Free — YC's first hackathon in India
- Lyzr Agentathon — Apr 25 — ₹2 Lakh prizes — Free — AI agents + Lyzr Architect
- HackBLR by Geekroom — Apr 26 — ₹25,000+ prizes — Free — AI Agents, Voice AI, LLM
- ElevenLabs Buildathon — Apr 18–19 — Free — Voice AI / Conversational AI
- HackBricks 2026 — Apr 24 — Free — ACM x Databricks, 24-hour
- GDG Build For Bengaluru — Apr 25 — Free — Google, 30-hour, social impact
- VibeCon India 2026 — Apr 16–17 — Free — Top 300 builder competition, direct YC interviews — https://vibecon.com
- Codex Community Hackathon — Apr 16 — Free — Community OpenAI Codex

### Conferences
- AWS Summit Bengaluru — Apr 22–23 — Free — Agentic AI, serverless, Amazon Bedrock
- GIDS 2026 Developer Summit — Apr 21–24 — Paid — Asia-Pacific's largest dev conference
- Rust India Conference — Apr 17–18 — Paid — India's premier Rust conference
- Tech & Innovation Summit — Apr 15–16 — Paid — AI, Web3, startups, blockchain

### Startup Events
- Y Combinator Startup School India — Apr 18 — Free (2,000 seats) — YC's first India event
- VibeCon India 2026 — Apr 16–17 — Free — Top 300 builders, direct YC interviews
- YC Secret (AI)fter Party — Apr 19 — Free — 2,336+ attendees

### April 27 – 30, 2026 (extension after main April week)
- Apr 27 — AI of the Week: What's actually worth using? (Solopreneurs Lab)
- Apr 27 — Citizen developers in the enterprise: What platform teams should know
- Apr 28 — Founders Networking: Connect & Help Each Other
- Apr 28 — GCU AWS Cloud Club — Inaugural Event (Garden City University OMR)
- Apr 29 — F*ckUp Night: Startup Failure Stories (Open Mic)
- Apr 29 — Elastic Agentic Talks: Building with AI Agents
- Apr 30 — Feedback Jam: Get Honest Takes On Your Build

### May 2026 — Highlights
- May 2 — GitHub Copilot Dev Days (Microsoft Prestige Ferns Galaxy)
- May 2 — Data & AI Forum #2 | Women in Tech Special (43 Workspace and Events)
- May 2 — Building AI Agents with Kiro, MCP, and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
- May 7 — GitHub Agentic Workflows: Automation That Actually Reads the Room
- May 9 — Platform Engineering Meetup Bengaluru Edition (Urban Vault)
- May 9 — React Meetup #103 (MiQ Digital)
- May 9 — Building a distributed transactional database (HasGeek Bengaluru Systems Meetup)
- May 9 — Scrum Meet-up: Next-Gen Scrum, AI for Agile leaders (DevOn Software)
- May 13 — Applied AI Ethics Monthly Mixer
- May 14 — Agent Orchestration: Directing Your AI Dream Team
- May 16 — Apache Kafka® Meetup Bangalore (New Relic)
- May 16 — Agentic AI for developers (Embassy Tech Village, Bellandur)
- May 16 — Agentic AI Unplugged: Bengaluru Edition (Samarthanam Auditorium)
- May 16 — Crafting Multi-Agent Systems That Think and Act (Nutanix HasGeek Fifth Elephant)
- May 16 — Data + DevOps Powering Modern Applications (Harness.io R&D labs)
- May 18 — Integrating APIs and Services with AgentCore Gateway
- May 22 — Enterprise AI in Production (HasGeek Fifth Elephant Mini Conf)
- May 23 — From Chat to Agents: Five AI Engineering Paradigms (Equal Experts)
- May 23 — From Vibe to Validation: AI Productivity for QA Engineers (Manyata Embassy)
- May 23 — Vibe Delivery: AI Productivity for PMs & Scrum Masters (Whitefield)
- May 24 — Role of an Architect in the Coming Age of AI (Jayanagar)
- May 30 — Tech4Food: AI in Food (HasGeek)

### Free Events (18 total)
OpenAI Codex Hackathon, YC Startup School India, AWS Summit Bengaluru, VibeCon India, JioHotstar ScaleUp 2.0, ElevenLabs Buildathon, Meta PyTorch Hackathon, Golang Bangalore Meetup, GDG Build For Bengaluru, HackBricks 2026, HackBLR, Aya AI Hackathon, YC BLR Pre-Event Mixer, YC Secret (AI)fter Party, After YC AI Community Mixer, The Other Room, 11th Founders & Freelancers Meetup, AI Tinkerers Bengaluru

## Bangalore Accelerators (13 verified, separate directory)

A curated, link-verified directory of accelerators with a Bangalore presence. Includes program name, sector focus, stage, equity terms, ticket size, program length, and direct apply links. Per-accelerator detail pages at /accelerators/<slug>.

- Axilor Ventures — seed fund, B2B / health / climate / supply chain — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/axilor-ventures
- NSRCEL (IIM Bangalore) — equity-free incubation + accelerator — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/nsrcel-iimb
- Surge by Peak XV — up to $3M, 16-week seed program — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/peakxv-surge
- Accel Atoms — pre-seed scaling for India / India-origin founders — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/accel-atoms
- Turbostart — up to $1M, bi-annual cohort, sector-agnostic — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/turbostart
- Anthill Ventures — Speed Scaling for health / climate / urban — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/anthill-ventures
- Rainmatter (Zerodha) — patient capital for fintech / climate / health — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/rainmatter
- NetApp Excellerator — equity-free deep-tech B2B accelerator — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/netapp-excellerator
- Flipkart Leap — $200k–$500k, 16 weeks, Indian e-commerce — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/flipkart-leap
- Google for Startups Accelerator: India — equity-free 3-month AI cohort — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/google-for-startups-india
- Microsoft for Startups (Founders Hub) — equity-free, up to $150k credits — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/microsoft-for-startups
- C-CAMP (DBT, Govt. of India) — biotech, up to ₹50L grant — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/ccamp-bangalore
- GINSERV — 6-month deep-tech acceleration program — https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators/ginserv

Browse all: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/accelerators

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What tech events are happening in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: Over 45 events including OpenAI Codex Hackathon, YC Startup School India, AWS Summit, GIDS, Meta PyTorch Hackathon, VibeCon, Rust India Conference, ElevenLabs Buildathon, and more. Full list: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/events/april-2026

Q: What tech events are happening in Bengaluru in May 2026?
A: 35+ events including GitHub Copilot Dev Days (May 2), Apache Kafka Meetup Bangalore (May 16), HasGeek "Enterprise AI in Production" Mini Conf (May 22), React Meetup #103 (May 9), Platform Engineering Meetup (May 9), and many agentic-AI workshops covering AgentCore, Bedrock, MCP, and multi-agent orchestration. Full list: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/events/may-2026

Q: Are there free tech events in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: Yes, 18 events are completely free including OpenAI Codex Hackathon, YC Startup School India, AWS Summit, VibeCon, Meta PyTorch Hackathon, and more.

Q: What hackathons are happening in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: 10 hackathons with $145K+ prizes: OpenAI Codex ($100K), Meta PyTorch ($30K), ContextCon YC x Crustdata ($12K), Lyzr Agentathon (₹2L), HackBLR (₹25K+), VibeCon India, ElevenLabs Buildathon, HackBricks, GDG Build For Bengaluru, and Codex Community Hackathon.

Q: What is the biggest tech event in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: AWS Summit Bengaluru (free, 2 days), GIDS Developer Summit (4 days, Asia-Pacific's largest), and YC Startup School India (2,000 seats, YC's first India event).

Q: Are there AI events in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: Yes, many. OpenAI Codex Hackathon (AI coding agents), JioHotstar ScaleUp (AI at scale), Aya AI Hackathon (AI agents + DeFi), ElevenLabs Buildathon (voice AI), HackBLR (AI agents + LLM), After YC AI Community Mixer, and AI Tinkerers meetup.

Q: Are there Web3 or crypto events in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: Yes. W3Summit 2026 (India's biggest Web3 festival, 2,000+ attendees), Aya AI Hackathon (DeFi + AI), and Tech & Innovation Summit (blockchain track).

Q: Where can I find developer conferences in India in April 2026?
A: Bengaluru hosts GIDS 2026 (Asia-Pacific's largest polyglot dev conference, 4 days at IISc), Rust India Conference (2 days at NIMHANS), and AWS Summit (free, 2 days at KTPO Whitefield).

Q: What startup events are in Bengaluru in April 2026?
A: Y Combinator Startup School India (first-ever in India, 2,000 seats), VibeCon India (top 300 builders, YC interview chance), YC pre-event mixer, YC after-party (2,336+ going), AI Community Mixer, and Founders & Freelancers Meetup.

Q: Is Y Combinator coming to India in 2026?
A: Yes. YC Startup School India is on April 18, 2026 in Bengaluru. It's YC's first-ever Startup School in India with 2,000 seats and speakers from Razorpay, Meesho, Groww, and Emergent. Registration: https://events.ycombinator.com/yc-sus-india

Q: What is OpenAI Codex Hackathon Bengaluru?
A: OpenAI's first official Codex Hackathon in India on April 16, 2026 in Bengaluru. Co-hosted with GrowthX. 100+ builders competing for $100,000 in prizes. Free entry. Register: https://luma.com/x495vdw1
